title: pilosella amphipolia
intro: Pilosella amphipolia, also known as Mouse-ear Hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Pilosella amphipolia has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pilosella amphipolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Pilosella amphipolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and ointment, which can be used to treat wounds, burns, and other skin conditions.
